title: June Book Club: Love Overboard
description: We chat about our June book club pick, Love Overboard by Kandi Steiner — perfect for fans of Below Deck. Spoiler alert: we have a lot of feelings about this one. Major spoilers throughout.

title: Book Review: The MindF*ck Series
description: We discuss the MindF*ck series by S.T. Abby. We are huge fans, but caution readers to look up trigger warnings first — this series is seriously dark. Major spoilers, listen with care.

title: He's a 10 but…
description: We haze Andrew with a game of "he’s a 10 but…" Books mentioned include The Pucking Wrong Number, Zodiac Academy, and Pestilence. He hazes us right back with a blooper at the start.

title: Interview with Silent Book Club of Monmouth County
description: We’re joined by Nicole and Amy, co-leaders of Silent Book Club of Monmouth County. They tell us what silent book club is, their summer meetups, and their favorite authors and books.

title: May Book Club: The Seven Year Slip
description: Our May book club pick, The Seven Year Slip by Ashley Poston — a magical-realism romance set in NYC that deals with grief. Andrew also shares his thoughts on Off Campus episode 1. Major spoilers.

title: Off Campus
description: Season 2 kicks off with a deep dive on the new Off Campus show — spoilers for both the show and the entire book series. We also welcome our new editor and resident non-reader, Andrew.

title: Book Review: The Pucking Wrong Number
description: A book that made a friend so angry I knew I had to read it. Part hockey romance, part dark romance, 100% over the top. Go in for the laughs. Major spoilers.

title: Author Interview: Cassie Swindon
description: We’re joined by Cassie Swindon, an indie fantasy-romance author in North Carolina who also runs Oak & Ink pop-up book markets. She tells us about her process, her books, and her cats.

title: April Book Club: Things We Left Behind
description: We finish the Knockemout series by Lucy Score — our favorite of the whole series, and we’re sad to see it end. Major spoilers, listen with care.

title: Book Review: The Last Letter
description: The emotionally traumatizing The Last Letter by Rebecca Yarros. It hurt our feelings over and over — and yet, we liked it. Major spoilers.

title: Book Review: In Her Own League
description: In Her Own League by Liz Tomforde, one of our favorite authors. A spicy sports romance — and a bittersweet close to the Windy City series. Major spoilers.

title: Reading One Star Reviews (Again)
description: What can we say? We love hurting our own feelings. Some spoilers, though not as bad as usual.
